description: Version manifest for all governance templates and framework core files. Used by SETUP --upgrade to detect and apply template changes to materialized projects.
upgrade_strategy: Smart Additive Merge — ALL files use the same unified strategy: format-aware structural diff → add new content only → resolve placeholders in additions → preserve all existing content. No separate Cat A/B/C upgrade paths.

content_types.universal: No placeholders. New structural additions are merged additively.
content_types.stack_configured: Contains {{PLACEHOLDER}} tokens. New sections/fields are added, placeholders resolved via Smart Discovery + RDR.
content_types.project_data: Project-specific values. New fields/sections added with defaults, existing values never modified.

framework_core._description: Framework-internal files (agents, orchestration, utilities). NOT materialized to projects — used directly by the LLM. Tracked for upgrade auditing and changelog traceability.
framework_core._architecture: Custom Agents (v9.0.0) — Hub-and-spoke: Factory (visible orchestrator, strict dispatcher) + 8 invisible specialist workers via handoffs. Agent definitions in .github/agents/, detailed instructions as .instructions.md in .github/instructions/, cross-cutting protocols as Skills in .github/skills/. Materialized rules as .instructions.md with applyTo in docs/rules/.
